remediations.title: Acquire a current lease
remediations.safe_action: Request a new lease for the complete resource set before submitting another operation.
remediations.verification: Read the ownership snapshot and confirm the new lease is current.

remediations.title: Activate the installed driver
remediations.safe_action: Use the platform's documented reboot or receiver-disconnect activation path.
remediations.verification: Run Doctor and confirm the loaded and installed driver identities match.

remediations.title: Collect a privacy-safe support bundle
remediations.safe_action: Preview and create the bounded HyperFlux support bundle for the unresolved internal failure.
remediations.verification: Confirm the bundle preview excludes private paths, serials, raw reports, and arbitrary logs.

remediations.title: Correct the request
remediations.safe_action: Correct the named request field and submit a new request with a new request identifier.
remediations.verification: Validate the corrected request against the negotiated protocol schema.

remediations.title: Disable the unsupported feature
remediations.safe_action: Continue without the feature or use a peer that advertises it during negotiation.
remediations.verification: Repeat negotiation and inspect the enabled feature set.

remediations.title: Resolve the existing transaction
remediations.safe_action: Look up the existing transaction identifier; do not resubmit the hardware operation.
remediations.verification: Confirm the transaction reaches exactly one recorded terminal outcome.

remediations.title: Use a qualified device capability
remediations.safe_action: Keep the device read-only until an evidence-backed profile qualifies the requested capability.
remediations.verification: Inspect the capability snapshot and confirm the support level permits the operation.

remediations.title: Reconcile the current device state
remediations.safe_action: Do not repeat the old hardware operation automatically; refresh device state and submit only a new intentional request.
remediations.verification: Confirm the application has refreshed the active generation and is not replaying the unavailable transaction.

remediations.title: Refresh receiver state
remediations.safe_action: Discard state from the old generation and request a fresh snapshot before new work.
remediations.verification: Confirm the request uses the currently active generation identifier.

remediations.title: Release the current owner
remediations.safe_action: Release control in the owning application or close it, then request ownership again.
remediations.verification: Read the ownership snapshot and confirm the resource has no conflicting owner.

remediations.title: Repair state storage
remediations.safe_action: Restore writable, schema-compatible state storage without deleting the last known-good copy.
remediations.verification: Restart the bridge and confirm it can read and transactionally commit its state.

remediations.title: Retry within the declared bound
remediations.safe_action: Retry with bounded backoff only while the original deadline remains valid.
remediations.verification: Confirm the new attempt is admitted once and produces one terminal outcome.

remediations.title: Start the bridge service
remediations.safe_action: Start or restart the compatible HyperFlux bridge service.
remediations.verification: Run Doctor and confirm the bridge diagnostic endpoint is ready.

remediations.title: Submit a fresh operation
remediations.safe_action: Create a new request with a deadline that has not elapsed; do not revive the expired request.
remediations.verification: Confirm admission occurs before the new monotonic deadline.

remediations.title: Update the application integration
remediations.safe_action: Install an integration compatible with the negotiated HyperFlux SDK protocol.
remediations.verification: Restart the application and confirm protocol negotiation succeeds.

remediations.title: Update the protocol peer
remediations.safe_action: Update either peer so their supported protocol version ranges overlap.
remediations.verification: Repeat negotiation and confirm one common protocol version is selected.

remediations.title: Verify the profile catalog
remediations.safe_action: Reload the generated profile catalog and retain read-only behavior until its digest matches.
remediations.verification: Confirm the active profile identifier, revision, and digest match the generated catalog.

errors.technical_cause: The request deadline elapsed before transport admission.
errors.user_explanation: The operation expired before HyperFlux could safely start it.

safe_detail_fields.name: requested_generation
safe_detail_fields.description: Generation carried by the rejected request.

errors.technical_cause: The request references a receiver generation that is no longer active.
errors.user_explanation: The receiver reconnected or resumed, so the application must refresh its device state.

safe_detail_fields.name: protocol_range
safe_detail_fields.description: Protocol range advertised by the integration.

errors.technical_cause: The application integration is incompatible with the installed SDK protocol.
errors.user_explanation: This application adapter must be updated before it can use HyperFlux.

safe_detail_fields.name: subsystem
safe_detail_fields.description: Subsystem that raised the invariant failure.

errors.technical_cause: A declared HyperFlux invariant was violated.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux stopped the affected operation because an internal safety rule failed.

errors.technical_cause: The loaded kernel interface does not match the installed userspace contract.
errors.user_explanation: The newly installed driver is not active yet.

safe_detail_fields.name: transaction_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Transaction identity that has no retained or eviction record.

errors.technical_cause: The bounded bridge history has no retained or eviction record for the requested transaction.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux cannot determine the result of this transaction from its current history.

safe_detail_fields.name: transaction_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Transaction identity whose terminal record aged out.

errors.technical_cause: The transaction was known, but its terminal result aged out of bounded retained history.
errors.user_explanation: The transaction result is older than the history HyperFlux keeps in memory.

errors.technical_cause: Another live client owns at least one requested resource.
errors.user_explanation: Another application currently controls this device function.

errors.technical_cause: The lease no longer authorizes the requested resource set.
errors.user_explanation: The application's control lease ended before the operation started.

errors.technical_cause: Persisted bridge state could not be loaded and validated safely.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux could not read its saved state and kept hardware restoration disabled.

errors.technical_cause: A transactional state update could not be committed or rolled back safely.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux could not save its latest stable state.

safe_detail_fields.name: product_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Observed USB product identifier when available.

errors.technical_cause: No evidence-backed profile qualifies the requested device capability.
errors.user_explanation: The device is visible, but this operation is not qualified for it.

safe_detail_fields.name: active_digest
safe_detail_fields.description: Digest bound to the active generation.

safe_detail_fields.name: catalog_digest
safe_detail_fields.description: Digest from the generated profile catalog.

errors.technical_cause: The active profile binding does not match the generated profile catalog.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux paused writes because its hardware profile changed.

safe_detail_fields.name: client_max_version
safe_detail_fields.description: Highest protocol version supported by the client.

safe_detail_fields.name: client_min_version
safe_detail_fields.description: Lowest protocol version supported by the client.

safe_detail_fields.name: server_max_version
safe_detail_fields.description: Highest protocol version supported by the bridge.

safe_detail_fields.name: server_min_version
safe_detail_fields.description: Lowest protocol version supported by the bridge.

errors.technical_cause: The client and bridge protocol version ranges do not overlap.
errors.user_explanation: The application and HyperFlux service are not protocol-compatible.

errors.technical_cause: The request requires a feature that was not enabled during negotiation.
errors.user_explanation: This feature is unavailable with the current application and service combination.

errors.technical_cause: The bounded queue had no admissible capacity before the request deadline.
errors.user_explanation: HyperFlux is temporarily busy and did not start this operation.

safe_detail_fields.name: field
safe_detail_fields.description: Schema field path without request data.

safe_detail_fields.name: request_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Request identity when parsing reached it.

errors.technical_cause: The request violates the negotiated bounded protocol schema.
errors.user_explanation: The application sent a request HyperFlux cannot safely accept.

errors.technical_cause: The compatible bridge service is not ready to accept SDK requests.
errors.user_explanation: The HyperFlux service is not running yet.

safe_detail_fields.name: transaction_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Transaction that did not begin transport.

errors.technical_cause: Transport failed before any hardware frame was dispatched.
errors.user_explanation: The receiver was unavailable before HyperFlux sent anything.

safe_detail_fields.name: transaction_id
safe_detail_fields.description: Transaction whose transport outcome is uncertain.

errors.technical_cause: Transport began, but the bridge could not prove whether the receiver accepted a frame.
errors.user_explanation: The operation may have reached the receiver, so HyperFlux will not repeat it automatically.

errors.technical_cause: At least one declared frame was delivered before a later frame failed.
errors.user_explanation: The operation was only partly delivered and will not be repeated automatically.
